name: Gumdrop Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Gumdrops, chopped into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs with water until light.
2. Gradually add sugar and mix well.
3. Add sifted dry ingredients (flour and salt) to the mixture.
4. Stir in gumdrops and walnuts; mix thoroughly.
5. Shape into cookies and bake for 25 minutes at 350°F in a 9x13-inch pan.
6. While still warm, spread with Orange Butter Frosting.
7. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
Orange Butter Frosting:
Combine ingredients.
